title: Two dozen injured in Ukraine following Russian strikes
description: Russia targeted eight regions of Ukraine in its latest nighttime drone and missile barrage, with local authorities reporting that the strikes wounded more than two dozen civilians, including three children. The city of Dnipro bore the brunt of the attack, which saw more than 500 hundred drones launched against the central region of the country.

title: US-Iran truce under strain amid stalled talks and attacks on US allies
description: Washington and Tehran have been swapping proposals in an effort to end the conflict which broke out on February 28. The two sides have held a single round of talks so far amid a fragile ceasefire in place since April 8. The truce has come under strain following a likely-Iranian attack near a UAE power plant. The stalled talks and rising tension are also worrying markets. FRANCE 24's Philip Turle breaks it down for us.

title: France announces team of architects for Louvre overhaul

The overhaul will include a new entrance for the Paris museum and a dedicated space for the Mona Lisa.

title: US, Nigeria carry out fresh strikes on Islamic State group

title: Rare strike forces busiest US commuter line to a halt

The rail network has been shut down since May 16, after five of the railway's unions went on strike. France holds the G7 presidency and faces the tricky task of keeping dialogue open as tensions mount with Washington, over the latest tariff threats from Donald Trump.

title: Swatch watch triggers consumer frenzy from Europe to New York City
description: The launch of limited edition Swatch watches descended into chaos on May 18 in several European cities and New York, with French police firing tear gas to restore order at one store near Paris. Hundreds of people waited through the night - and in some cases for several days - hoping to get their hands on the "Royal Pop" timepieces, made in collaboration with luxury watchmaker Audemars Piguet.

description:

title: At least four killed in Ukrainian drone attacks on Russia
description: Russian authorities say three people killed in the Moscow region and one in Belgorod in Ukrainian attacks.

title: Sardar Azmoun left out as Iran announce World Cup 2026 squad
description: Veteran striker Azmoun was not named in the 30-man squad, which will be trimmed to 26 by June 1.

title: In Iraqi Desert, Two Israeli Outposts Were Kept Secret for Months
description: Israel spent over a year preparing a covert site in Iraq for its operations against Iran, regional officials say. Iraqi officials later confirmed the existence of a second base.

title: Названа причина мощного взрыва в израильском Бейт-Шемеше
description: Мощный взрыв в районе израильского города Бейт-Шемеш был частью испытаний. Об этом сообщила газета The Times of Israel.
